summary: Completed testing of 3 bug fixes for Acuity Team Hub. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 bug fixes verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Group rename implementation is correct - clicking group title shows inline input, Enter/blur saves via PUT /api/groups/{id}
Status labels save implementation is correct - handleSaveLabels calls PUT /api/boards/{boardId}/columns/{colId} with JSON body {options: [...]}
Board sharing implementation is correct - 'Share with Team' button calls POST /api/boards/{id}/share which adds all active team members
data-testid attributes are properly implemented: group-title-{id}, group-rename-input-{id}, share-board-btn, column-menu-{id}
seed_data_creation: Created test boards, groups, and items during testing. Test boards prefixed with TEST_ were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes are working correctly. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend UI verified: 1) Group rename works via inline edit, 2) Status labels save and persist after refresh, 3) Board sharing with team works (shows toast 'Board shared with 9 team members'). The 'Shared with me' sidebar section only appears for users who have boards shared TO them (not owners).

passed: Bug Fix #1: Group rename - click group title -> inline edit appears -> type new name -> press Enter -> group is renamed
Bug Fix #2: Status labels save - click column menu -> Edit labels -> modify label text -> Save Labels -> labels persist after refresh
Bug Fix #3: Board sharing - click 'Share with Team' button -> board shared with team members (toast confirmation)
Backend API: PUT /api/groups/{id} - group rename works
Backend API: PUT /api/boards/{boardId}/columns/{colId} with body options - labels save works
Backend API: POST /api/boards/{id}/share - board sharing works
Backend API: GET /api/boards/shared/me - shared boards endpoint works
not_tested: Shared with me sidebar section visibility - requires a second user to have boards shared TO them (current user is board owner)
